name: SMTPLLMPot
description: A super simple SMTP Honeypot built using GPT3.5 Tool: https://github.com/referefref/SMTPLLMPot. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #584 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map SMTPLLMPot output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved SMTPLLMPot output file to parse instead of running it live.
